profile.name: FIKRAT MAMMADOV
profile.title: Full-Stack Software Engineer
profile.summary: Full-stack Software Engineer specializing in multi-tenant SaaS architecture and systems development. Experienced in designing secure, scalable web applications using Next.js, Supabase, and PostgreSQL, alongside strong proficiency in C and C# for foundational software and desktop tools. Combines deep technical understanding with agile problem-solving to deliver robust, production-ready solutions for global remote teams.
profile.education: B.Sc. Computer Engineering, Yildiz Technical University, 4th Year

highlights: Engineered a secure, multi-tenant fitness SaaS platform, implementing RLS in Supabase to ensure strict tenant data isolation. [cite: 17, 18]
Architected and developed the frontend using Next.js, React, and Tailwind CSS, improving Ul performance and maintainability. [cite: 19]
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to optimize backend workflows, enhancing scalability and deployment efficiency through Docker. [cite: 20]
Supported senior engineers in developing custom consumer software, contributing to both frontend and backend modules. [cite: 23]
Debugged and refactored legacy codebases, improving reliability and reducing runtime errors by 20%. [cite: 24]
Documented development milestones and implemented best coding practices to align with company standards. [cite: 25]

projects.title: Meteor App
projects.description: A modern weather application with a highly responsive UI, fully deployed to Vercel for real-time forecasting.
